notes: F007 consumes F006's credentials module. It is a multi-step wizard for MT5 login: choose account type -> credentials -> confirm-live (only for live) -> test connection -> save. Sandbox is the default; live requires an explicit acknowledgement checkbox + typed LIVE confirmation. On macOS / Linux MT5 short-circuits with an unavailable payload -- documented, not a bug.
review_criteria: Confirm the demo-first default reads as the safe path from a first-time user's POV
Confirm the live-account confirmation is heavy enough to prevent misclicks but not so heavy it discourages legitimate live users
Identify what F007 does NOT try to solve (multi-broker portability, order routing, etc. -- feed to Sprint 2 backlog)
